# Jess Tresidder

> Jess Tresidder is an AI consultant, trainer, and growth systems engineer based in South Australia, working across Australia and APAC. She runs hands-on AI workshops, builds AI-powered go-to-market systems for B2B startups, and sets up AI automations that save businesses hours every week.

## About

Jess Tresidder started and sold her first business (Wild Hazel Designs) before turning 18, featured by ABC, news.com.au, and SA Life. She has built the full go-to-market system at a B2B AI SaaS startup from scratch, covering prospect research, outreach sequences, CRM automations, and content pipelines, and she trains corporate teams on practical, day-to-day AI use. In 2026 she was named in InDaily's 40 Under 40 (South Australia) and awarded the Inspiring Future Leaders Award by the SA Business Chamber. In 2025 she was a finalist for The Advertiser and Sunday Mail SkyCity Woman of the Year. She is also a Startmate Women Fellow, an Ehrenberg-Bass Scholar, and a New Colombo Plan Scholar.

## Expertise

Go-to-market (GTM) engineering, go-to-market strategy, B2B sales, sales development and prospecting, cold outreach and email, outbound sales systems, CRM automation, sales enablement, pipeline and funnel management, lead generation and enrichment, AI sales automation, and AI training. She built the full go-to-market and sales system at a B2B AI startup from scratch.

## Services

- **AI workshops and training**: Hands-on sessions for businesses and teams, in person across South Australia and online across Australia. Attendees leave with AI tools set up and working on their own laptop. Suitable for individuals through to corporate teams.
- **AI-powered growth systems**: AI go-to-market infrastructure for B2B startups, including AI-driven prospect research, automated list building and enrichment, personalised outreach sequences, CRM automation, and reporting.
- **AI implementation and automation**: Done-for-you AI automations built around a business's specific workflows, such as automated prospect research briefs before every meeting, follow-up drafting, lead enrichment, and on-brand content systems.

## Common questions

- **Is AI just ChatGPT?** No. AI now supports automated workflows for on-brand content, scheduled posting, personalised lead follow-up, automated morning briefs, and CRM updates. The chatbot is a small part of it.
- **Do you need to be technical?** No. If you can send an email and use Google, you can do this. No coding is taught or required.
- **Where are workshops run?** In person across South Australia (including Adelaide) and online for anyone in Australia.
